final:
module top_module(
    input clk, // clock input
    input reset, // synchronous reset input
    input enable, // counting enable input
    output reg [3:0] obf_count // 4-bit output
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if(reset) begin
        obf_count <= 4'b0; // reset to 0
    end else if(enable) begin
        if(obf_count == 4'b1001) begin
            obf_count <= 4'b0; // reset to 0 after counting to 9
        end else begin
            obf_count <= obf_count + 1; // increment counter
        end
    end
end

endmodule
